'''鈭歠-f-zh''' ('''kafafazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:star|star]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-f-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:star|star]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-f-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kafafazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifafazh|thifafazh]] || [[word:jifafazh|jifafazh]] || [[word:shifafazh|shifafazh]] || [[word:kifafazh|kifafazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufafazh|thuthufafazh]] || [[word:jujufafazh|jujufafazh]] || [[word:shushufafazh|shushufafazh]] || [[word:kukufafazh|kukufafazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufafazh|thufafazh]] || [[word:jufafazh|jufafazh]] || [[word:shufafazh|shufafazh]] || [[word:kufafazh|kufafazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufafazh|thufafazh]] || [[word:jufafazh|jufafazh]] || [[word:shufafazh|shufafazh]] || [[word:kufafazh|kufafazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefafazh|thefafazh]] || [[word:jefafazh|jefafazh]] || [[word:shefafazh|shefafazh]] || [[word:kefafazh|kefafazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofafazh|thothofafazh]] || [[word:jojofafazh|jojofafazh]] || [[word:shoshofafazh|shoshofafazh]] || [[word:kokofafazh|kokofafazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofafazh|thofafazh]] || [[word:jofafazh|jofafazh]] || [[word:shofafazh|shofafazh]] || [[word:kofafazh|kofafazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofafazh|thofafazh]] || [[word:jofafazh|jofafazh]] || [[word:shofafazh|shofafazh]] || [[word:kofafazh|kofafazh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fafazh|fafazh]] || [[word:fafazh|fafazh]] || [[word:fafazh|fafazh]] || [[word:fafazh|fafazh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fafazh|fafazh]] || [[word:fafazh|fafazh]] || [[word:fafazh|fafazh]] || [[word:fafazh|fafazh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fafazh|fafazh]] || [[word:fafazh|fafazh]] || [[word:fafazh|fafazh]] || [[word:fafazh|fafazh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fafazh|fafazh]] || [[word:fafazh|fafazh]] || [[word:fafazh|fafazh]] || [[word:fafazh|fafazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fafazh|th忙fafazh]] || [[word:j忙fafazh|j忙fafazh]] || [[word:sh忙fafazh|sh忙fafazh]] || [[word:k忙fafazh|k忙fafazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafafazh|thathafafazh]] || [[word:jajafafazh|jajafafazh]] || [[word:shashafafazh|shashafafazh]] || [[word:kakafafazh|kakafafazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafafazh|thafafazh]] || [[word:jafafazh|jafafazh]] || [[word:shafafazh|shafafazh]] || [[word:kafafazh|kafafazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafafazh|thafafazh]] || [[word:jafafazh|jafafazh]] || [[word:shafafazh|shafafazh]] || [[word:kafafazh|kafafazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafafazh|shafafazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafafazh|goshafafazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafafazh|gokishafafazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafafazhn眉|shafafazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafafazhnkn眉|goshafafazhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafafazhn眉|gokishafafazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafafazhsh毛|shafafazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafafazhnksh毛|goshafafazhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafafazhsh毛|gokishafafazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafafazhro|shafafazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafafazhnkro|goshafafazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafafazhro|gokishafafazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafafazhmu|shafafazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafafazhnkmu|goshafafazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafafazhmu|gokishafafazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafafazhsher|shafafazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafafazhnksher|goshafafazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafafazhsher|gokishafafazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafafazhng|shafafazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafafazhnkng|goshafafazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafafazhng|gokishafafazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafafazhya|shafafazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafafazhnkya|goshafafazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafafazhya|gokishafafazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafafazhyam|shafafazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafafazhnkyam|goshafafazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafafazhyam|gokishafafazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafafazhn眉sh毛|shafafazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafafazhnkn眉sh毛|goshafafazhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafafazhn眉sh毛|gokishafafazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafafazhn眉ro|shafafazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafafazhnkn眉ro|goshafafazhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafafazhn眉ro|gokishafafazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafafazhn眉mu|shafafazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafafazhnkn眉mu|goshafafazhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafafazhn眉mu|gokishafafazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafafazhsh毛n眉|shafafazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafafazhnksh毛n眉|goshafafazhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafafazhsh毛n眉|gokishafafazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafafazhsh毛ro|shafafazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafafazhnksh毛ro|goshafafazhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafafazhsh毛ro|gokishafafazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafafazhsh毛mu|shafafazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafafazhnksh毛mu|goshafafazhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafafazhsh毛mu|gokishafafazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafafazhron眉|shafafazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafafazhnkron眉|goshafafazhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafafazhron眉|gokishafafazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafafazhrosh毛|shafafazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafafazhnkrosh毛|goshafafazhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafafazhrosh毛|gokishafafazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafafazhromu|shafafazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafafazhnkromu|goshafafazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafafazhromu|gokishafafazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafafazhmun眉|shafafazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafafazhnkmun眉|goshafafazhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafafazhmun眉|gokishafafazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafafazhmush毛|shafafazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafafazhnkmush毛|goshafafazhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafafazhmush毛|gokishafafazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafafazhmuro|shafafazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafafazhnkmuro|goshafafazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafafazhmuro|gokishafafazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
